NAME: National Bioscience Database Center
DESCRIPTION: **NBDC** coordinates Japanese life-science database policy and infrastructure with domestic and international partners. It oversees **human data sharing** (review, security guidelines, and linkage to archives such as **JGA**), **group-level restricted sharing**, and discovery services such as **TogoVar**. Day-to-day operation of the **NBDC Human Database** and **NBDC Group Shared Database** platforms is carried out with **DBCLS** in cooperation with the **DDBJ Center** at NIG.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: NBDC Human Database
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: Portal to **apply for submission or reuse** of human omics and related data under NBDC guidelines; reviews **controlled-access** datasets archived in **JGA** and coordinates with [DDBJ](https://www.ddbj.nig.ac.jp/). (Operated by **DBCLS**; successor site to the former *humandbs.biosciencedbc.jp* URL.)

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: JGA
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Japanese Genotype-phenotype Archive**—repository for **individual-level** genetic and phenotypic data with access controls; Japan’s counterpart in spirit to [dbGaP](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gap/) and the [EGA](https://ega-archive.org/), operated by the **DDBJ Center** under NBDC/DBCLS policy workflows.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: NBDC Group Shared Database
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: Infrastructure for **laboratory- and consortium-scale** sharing when public release or JGA-style archives are not appropriate—**group-restricted** access with NBDC oversight. (Operated by **DBCLS**; replaces the former *gr-sharingdbs.biosciencedbc.jp* service.)

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: TogoVar
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Japanese genetic variation** browser integrating allele frequencies, transcripts, and disease/clinical annotations—useful for interpreting variants in **Japanese** and related cohorts; currently provided via **DBCLS** (historically promoted through NBDC).
